title: Context Engineering and Repository Grounding · Prompt Defense
summary: Ground an agent in a large unfamiliar repository without flooding its context. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a repository context map and retrieval plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Rank repository files, official docs, generated artifacts, tests, and user statements by authority for the task.
Provide paths, search terms, dependency boundaries, and examples that route efficient discovery.
Separate one-turn constraints from durable repository instructions such as AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Diagnose the hidden failure
steps.instruction:
quiz case — Use a changed quiz case for prompt context engineering that tests this competency: Refresh drift-prone facts and summarize stable discoveries before context compaction.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write the quiz evidence note for Context Refresh: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Use a changed quiz case for prompt context engineering that tests this competency: Refresh drift-prone facts and summarize stable discoveries before context compaction.. steps.why: Retrieving Context Refresh through the concrete a repository context map and retrieval plan case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Refresh drift-prone facts and summarize stable discoveries before context compaction.
